prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约5549名，2023年约4894名，2024年约4314名，呈逐年上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧）；2025年因四川首次实施新高考（物理类/历史 类），选科要求变化导致最低位次大幅后移至约10101名（不限选科组），但选化学组仍维持约4527名高位；该校在四川理科/物理类招生计划：2022年54人、20 23年55人、2024年58人、2025年57人，基本稳定；2026年计划大幅扩招至80人，较2025年增加约40%，扩招幅度显著，将明显拉低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程 、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第39名，近年排名稳定在38-41名区间，属于国内顶尖211院校，在电子信息领域享有极高声誉；2026年声誉评价为 偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（学生遭遇冷暴力和校园霸凌），可能轻微抑制报考热度；抖音热度排名第60位（较热），视频18条，综合热度约53万，标签包括\"顶级211的压 迫感\"\"IT领域之王\"，正面曝光为主；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A类学科，在电子信 息、计算机领域实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024-2026年持续高热推荐，计算机类持续推荐；四川省2026年高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（约46.3万）增加约15.6%，竞争加剧；2026年物理类；西安电子科技大学位于陕西（邻省），对四川考生地域吸引力较强；该校在四川招生占比约2%-4%，属省外招生重点省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大 幅后移的基数效应、2026年计划扩招40%的显著供给增加、四川省考生总数增长约15.6%带来的竞争加剧，以及西电核心专业（电子信息、计算机）持续高热的社会需求，考虑选科门槛提升（2026年物理类全部要求选化学）和考生规模增长，适度修正后预测最低位次约12347名，区间11847-12847名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 5549, in 2023 about 4894, and in 2024 about 4314, showing an upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing, competition intensifying); in 2025, due to Sichuan's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category/History Category), changes in subject requirements caused the minimum ranking to significantly drop to about 10101 (unrestricted subject group), but the chemistry-required group still maintained a high ranking of about 4527; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics in Sichuan: 54 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 58 in 2024, 57 in 2025, basically stable; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 80, an increase of about 40% compared to 2025, a notable expansion that will significantly lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 39th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 38-41 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 universities, with a very high reputation in the field of electronic information; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students experiencing cold violence and campus bullying), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranking 60th (relatively hot), 18 videos, comprehensive popularity about 530,000, tags include 'pressure of top 211' and 'king of IT field', mainly positive exposure; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-, a total of 5 A-class disciplines, with top national strength in electronic information and computer fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, computer majors continuously recommended; the total number of Sichuan college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 463,000), intensifying competition; 2026 Physics Category; Xidian University is located in Shaanxi (neighboring province), with strong regional appeal to Sichuan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2%-4%, making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop in the first year of the new college entrance exam in 2025, the notable supply increase from the 2026 enrollment expansion of 40%, the intensified competition from the about 15.6% increase in Sichuan candidates, and the sustained high social demand for Xidian's core majors (electronic information, computer), along with the increased subject selection threshold (all Physics Category requiring chemistry in 2026) and candidate scale growth, after moderate correction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 12347, with a range of 11847-12847.

Xidian University has top national strength in electronic information (A+ disciplines), and the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 provides a rare admission opportunity. It is recommended to prioritize majors closely related to the university's advantageous disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 3898, in 2023 about 3670, in 2024 about 3879, and in 2025 (History Category) about 3924. Over the past four years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 3670-3924 range, showing overall stability. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/History Category in Sichuan: 30 students each year from 2022 to 2025, remaining stable; the 2026 plan reduces to 26 students, a decrease of about 13.3% compared to 2025, which will slightly raise the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 39th in the Soft Science Ranking. Although strong in science and engineering, the 211 level still holds strong appeal for liberal arts students. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but mainly involves science and engineering students, with limited impact on liberal arts applications. Douyin popularity ranks 60th (relatively hot), with overall positive exposure. Xidian's liberal arts majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) integrate with the university's advantageous disciplines (electronic information, computer science) for cross-disciplinary cultivation, forming distinctive directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese/Chinese Language majors have been consistently recommended from 2023 to 2024, while Business Administration shows divergent wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the total number of Sichuan Gaokao examinees is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025. The scale of History Category examinees is expected to grow correspondingly, intensifying competition. Xidian University is located in Shaanxi (neighboring province), with strong regional appeal to Sichuan examinees. The university's liberal arts enrollment proportion in Sichuan remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 History Category ranking of about 3924 as a baseline, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 13.3% leading to decreased supply, the total number of Sichuan examinees increasing by about 15.6% intensifying competition, and the differentiated advantage of Xidian's liberal arts majors with specialized cultivation (electronic information cross-integration), the predicted minimum ranking is about 3580, with a range of 3080-4080.
